narrative:
Cols 81-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,440 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 29.1 percentage points.
